name: Sausage Apple Omelet Roll
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups (12 oz) bulk pork sausage, cooked and drained
1 cup (4 oz.) shredded sharp Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine half a cup of salad dressing, flour, and salt.
2. Gradually add milk and beaten egg yolks while stirring constantly over low heat until thickened.
3. Remove from heat and let cool for 15 minutes.
4. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Pour the mixture into a 15 x 10 x 1-inch jelly roll pan lined with greased wax paper.
6. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
7. Invert onto a towel, carefully remove the wax paper.
8. Cover with the remaining salad dressing, sausage, three-quarters of a cup of cheese, and apple.
9. Roll up the omelet, starting at the narrow end.
10. Place seam side down on a serving platter, topped with the remaining cheese.
11. Serves 6 to 8.
